show_banner_ads.description: Control banner ad visibility across entire app. Set to false to hide all banner ads.

show_native_ads.description: Control native ad visibility across entire app. Set to false to hide all native ads.

show_interstitial_ads.description: Control interstitial ad visibility across entire app. Set to false to hide all interstitial ads.

interstitial_ad_frequency.description: Show interstitial ad after every X screens. Higher value = less frequent ads. Minimum value is 1.

android_banner_ad_id.description: Android Banner Ad Unit ID. Replace with your real AdMob Ad Unit ID.

android_interstitial_ad_id.description: Android Interstitial Ad Unit ID. Replace with your real AdMob Ad Unit ID.

android_native_ad_id.description: Android Native Ad Unit ID. Replace with your real AdMob Ad Unit ID.

ios_banner_ad_id.description: iOS Banner Ad Unit ID. Replace with your real AdMob Ad Unit ID.

ios_interstitial_ad_id.description: iOS Interstitial Ad Unit ID. Replace with your real AdMob Ad Unit ID.

ios_native_ad_id.description: iOS Native Ad Unit ID. Replace with your real AdMob Ad Unit ID.

version.description: Initial Remote Config setup for ad management
